x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Warranty expiration data is a primary signal Now Assist HAM uses for AI-powered proactive refresh recommendations and risk alerts. Without warranty dates, AI cannot identify assets approaching end of warranty or generate timely replacement recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No hardware asset records found", finding: "No hardware asset records. Warranty data cannot be assessed." }; } var gaWarranty = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaWarranty.addQuery("warranty_expiration", "!=", ""); gaWarranty.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaWarranty.query(); var withWarranty = gaWarranty.next() ? parseInt(gaWarranty.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withWarranty / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of hardware assets have warranty expiration data (" + withWarranty + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of hardware assets have warranty expiration dates. Now Assist HAM can generate AI-powered warranty risk alerts and proactive refresh recommendations." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of assets have warranty expiration data (target: 80%+). Now Assist HAM AI warranty risk analysis will have incomplete coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of assets have warranty expiration data. Now Assist HAM cannot generate meaningful AI warranty risk alerts without this data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate warranty expiration dates on all hardware asset records. Import warranty data from procurement records or vendor portals. Navigate to Hardware Asset Management > Assets to bulk update warranty fields.
